summary: Test suite covers only basic happy-path scenarios for core parsing/aggregation functions. Critical gaps: (1) GitHub Actions workflow testing completely missing—task explicitly requires validation via `act`, actionlint, and workflow structure checks. (2) CLI script (run_aggregator.py) untested—no argument parsing, file handling, or output validation. (3) Error handling untested—no malformed XML/JSON, missing files, invalid formats, or permission errors. (4) No edge cases—empty suites, zero durations, special characters, duplicate test names, or large datasets. (5) Fixture code hardcoded/duplicated instead of reusable pytest fixtures. (6) Markdown assertions only check string presence, not structure or format. Missing required end-to-end integration tests. Would fail to catch regressions in error paths or workflow execution.
